title: identifiers
text: identifiers Specify whether identifiers should be quoted. USYS$ODx_PARAMS = identifiers : quoted | unquoted USYS$ODx_PARAMS = id : quoted | unquoted Description Use the identifiers option to specify whether identifiers (the names of tables, columns, keys, and indexes) should be enclosed in the designated identifier quote character . The default value is unquoted . Related Links identifier quote char Set the character to use as quotation mark for identifiers. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
